2026-04-14T23:29:36.2270217Z ---
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2271213Z description: |
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2271927Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2272891Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2313992Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2314547Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2314698Z on:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2315037Z   push:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2315396Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2315821Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2316069Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2316239Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2316791Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2316961Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2317191Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2317352Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2317753Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2318206Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2318576Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2318916Z   noop:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2319266Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2319677Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2320011Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2320638Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2321349Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2321778Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2322220Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2322711Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2323091Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2323477Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2323848Z       steps:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2324231Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2324737Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2325203Z           env:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2325821Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2331583Z           with:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2332018Z             script: |
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2332545Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2333204Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2333905Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2334535Z                 return;
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2334927Z               }
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2335138Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2335674Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2336720Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2337239Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2338299Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2340063Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2421498Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2422512Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2423666Z               }
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2423898Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2424423Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2425018Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2425488Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2426010Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2443552Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2444097Z               });

2026-04-14T23:29:36.2491147Z   workflow_dispatch:

2026-04-14T23:29:36.2492587Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2492817Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2492980Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2493387Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2493857Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2494214Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2494554Z   noop:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2494917Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2495339Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2495673Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2496306Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2497580Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2498029Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2498484Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2498980Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2499460Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2499860Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2500236Z       steps:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2500620Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2501131Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2502169Z           env:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2502800Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2503499Z           with:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2503862Z             script: |
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2504377Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2505004Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2505658Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2507008Z                 return;
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2507401Z               }
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2507614Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2507846Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2508557Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2509057Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2509489Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2510307Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2511116Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2513067Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2513691Z               }
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2514388Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2514681Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2515276Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2515735Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2517260Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2517758Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2518257Z               });
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2518842Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2519271Z 
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2519433Z tools:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2519765Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2520111Z   github:
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2520453Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2520744Z

2026-04-14T23:29:36.2521478Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2522146Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T23:29:36.2534586Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
